cf_parsed.subtask_body:
Verifying current best solution and checking if anything cheaper exists.

Current best: Port-Rock(22) + Cape-Rock(17) + Cape-Pine(8) = 47 cable. Active: Port, Rock, Cape, Pine. Interference pairs active: Cape-Pine → Cape≠Pine. Assign Port=1, Rock=1, Cape=1, Pine=2. 2 colors. Total = 47 + 30 = 77.

Can we get cable < 47? Need to connect Port, Pine, Rock with possibly intermediate nodes.
- Cheapest path Port-Pine: Port-Rock(22)+Cape-Rock(17)+Cape-Pine(8)=47 or Port-Rock(22)+Cliff-Pine(9)+Cliff-Rock(25)=56 or Bay-Port(2)+Bay-Rock(22)+Cape-Rock(17)+Cape-Pine(8)=49.
- Direct Port-Rock=22 is unavoidable or we need longer path.
- Alternative: Dune-Port(7)+Dune-Rock(20)+Cape-Pine(8)+Cape-Rock(17)=52, worse.
- Bay-Port(2)+Bay-Rock(22)+Cape-Pine(8)+Cape-Rock(17)=49 with 2 colors=79, worse.
- Mill-Port(9)+Dune-Mill(3)+Dune-Rock(20)+Cape-Pine(8)=40 cable but Cape not connected. Add Cape-Rock(17)=57, worse.
- Can we avoid Cape-Rock(17)? Connect Pine via Cliff: Cliff-Pine(9)+Cliff-Rock(25)=34 for Pine-Rock, plus Port-Rock(22)=56 total. 2 colors (Cliff-Pine active→Cliff≠Pine). Total=56+30=86. Worse.
- Port-Rock(22)+Cape-Pine(8)+Cape-Rock(17)=47 appears optimal for 2-color solutions.
- 1-color: need no active interference pairs. Any tree with Port,Pine,Rock active will have Dune-Port if Dune active, Cape-Pine if Cape active, Cliff-Pine if Cliff active. Direct Port-Rock(22) fine. Need Pine connected without triggering conflicts. Cape-Pine triggers Cape-Pine conflict. Cliff-Pine triggers Cliff-Pine. Dune-Pine(25) - Dune-Port conflict if Port active. Mill-Pine(25) - no interference! Mill-Pine(25)+Port-Rock(22)+Mill-Rock? No Mill-Rock edge. Mill-Port(9)+Mill-Pine(25)+Port-Rock(22)=56. Active: Port,Mill,Pine,Rock. Conflicts: Bay-Port(Bay inactive), Dune-Port(Dune inactive), Cliff-Pine(Cliff inactive). No active conflicts! 1 color! Total=56+15=71. Better!

Verify: edges Mill-Port(9), Mill-Pine(25), Port-Rock(22). 3 edges, 4 nodes {Port,Mill,Pine,Rock}. Connected tree. Required terminals Port,Pine,Rock all included. Active interference pairs: none (Bay,Dune,Cliff,Cape all inactive). 1 frequency suffices. Total=56+15=71.
cf_parsed.updated_plan_state: Best solution found: Mill-Port(9)+Mill-Pine(25)+Port-Rock(22)=56 cable, 1 color, total=71. No active interference pairs. Beats previous best of 77. This seems hard to improve further - any cheaper tree would need cable < 56 with 1 color, which seems unlikely given Port-Rock(22) is nearly mandatory and cheapest Pine connection without conflict is Mill-Pine(25).

parsed.subtask_body:
Searching for cheaper trees with cable cost < 49 while maintaining 2 colors.

Try: Dune-Port(7) + Bay-Dune(7) + Bay-Rock(22) + Cape-Pine(8) = 44 cable. Tree on {Port,Dune,Bay,Rock,Cape,Pine}, 5 edges, 6 nodes. Connected: Port-Dune-Bay-Rock, Bay connected, Cape-Pine connected but Cape not connected to rest! Need Cape-Rock(17) or similar. Add Cape-Rock: 44+17=61, worse.

Try: Bay-Port(2) + Bay-Rock(22) + Cape-Pine(8) + Cape-Rock(17) = 49. Already found (Candidate 2).

Try: Bay-Port(2) + Dune-Port(7) + Dune-Rock(20) + Cape-Pine(8) + Cape-Rock(17). That's 5 edges, 6 nodes {Port,Bay,Dune,Rock,Cape,Pine}. But Cape-Rock and Dune-Rock both connect to Rock - check for cycle: Port-Bay, Port-Dune, Dune-Rock, Cape-Rock, Cape-Pine. Is there a cycle? Rock connects to Dune and Cape; Cape connects to Pine and Rock; no cycle. Tree! Cable=2+7+20+8+17=54. Conflicts: Bay-Port(active)→Bay≠Port; Bay-Dune(active)→Bay≠Dune; Dune-Port(active)→Dune≠Port; Cape-Pine(active)→Cape≠Pine. Need: Bay≠Port, Bay≠Dune, Dune≠Port, Cape≠Pine. Port=1,Dune=2,Bay=3,Rock=1,Cape=1,Pine=2. 3 colors. Cost=54+45=99. Worse.

Try: Mill-Port(9) + Dune-Mill(3) + Dune-Rock(20) + Cape-Pine(8) + Cape-Rock(17). 5 edges, 6 nodes {Port,Mill,Dune,Rock,Cape,Pine}. Cable=9+3+20+8+17=57. Conflicts among active: Bay inactive, Cliff inactive. Dune-Port(active)→Dune≠Port. Cape-Pine(active)→Cape≠Pine. Port=1,Mill=1,Dune=2,Rock=1,Cape=1,Pine=2. 2 colors. Total=57+30=87. Worse than 79.

Try: Bay-Port(2) + Bay-Mill(9) + Dune-Mill(3) + Dune-Rock(20) + Cape-Pine(8). 5 edges, 6 nodes {Port,Bay,Mill,Dune,Rock,Cape,Pine}... wait 7 nodes need 6 edges. Cape not connected to rest. Add Cape-Rock(17): cable=2+9+3+20+8+17=59. Conflicts: Bay-Port→Bay≠Port; Bay-Dune→Bay≠Dune; Dune-Port(both active)→Dune≠Port; Cape-Pine→Cape≠Pine. Need 3 colors again. 59+45=104. Worse.

Candidate 2 at 79 remains best. Can we get cable < 49 with 2 colors? Minimum spanning tree on {Port,Pine,Rock} directly: Port-Rock(22)+Cape-Pine(8)+Cape-Rock(17)=47, 4 nodes. Conflicts: Cape-Pine→Cape≠Pine. Only 1 constraint, 2 colors. Total=47+30=77! Check tree: Port-Rock, Cape-Rock, Cape-Pine. 3 edges, 4 nodes {Port,Rock,Cape,Pine}. Connected, no cycle. Valid!

Assign: Port=1, Rock=1, Cape=1, Pine=2 (Cape≠Pine). 2 colors. Total=47+30=77. Better!

Can we do even better? Try Port-Rock(22)+Cape-Pine(8)+Cliff-Rock(25)... no, 55 cable. Try Port-Rock(22)+Cape-Pine(8)+Cape-Rock(17)=47 is already good.

What about 1 color? Need no active interference pairs. Port-Rock(22)+Dune-Pine(25)=47 but not connected (Port,Rock separate from Dune,Pine). Need bridge: add Dune-Rock(20)→47+20=67, 1 color possible if no conflicts. Active: Port,Rock,Dune,Pine. Dune-Port active→Dune≠Port. Can't do 1 color. 67+30=97. Worse.

Best found: Port-Rock(22)+Cape-Rock(17)+Cape-Pine(8)=47 cable, 2 colors, total=77.
parsed.updated_plan_state: Best solution: tree Port-Rock, Cape-Rock, Cape-Pine with cable cost 47 and 2 colors = total 77. Beats previous best of 79. Check if anything cheaper exists: need cable < 47 with ≤2 colors connecting Port, Pine, Rock. Minimum possible with 3 nodes directly would need Port-Pine edge (doesn't exist) or Port-Rock(22)+something to Pine cheaply. Cape-Pine(8) is cheapest to Pine. Cape-Rock(17) connects Cape to Rock. Alternative: Port-Rock(22)+Cliff-Pine(9)+Cliff-Rock(25)=56, worse. Or Bay-Port(2)+Bay-Rock(22)+Cape-Pine(8)+Cape-Rock(17)=49 with 2 colors=79. Current best 77 seems hard to beat.

transcript.content:
PLAN_STATE: Goal: minimize cable_cost + 15*num_frequencies. Baseline is 54 + 2*15 = 84. Strategy: enumerate small Steiner trees connecting {Port, Pine, Rock}, then solve graph coloring for each to find total cost. Key insight: adding cheap intermediate nodes (Bay, Dune, Mill, Cape) can reduce cable cost but adds coloring constraints. Try several candidate trees and pick the best total. Focus on trees using Bay-Port(2), Dune-Mill(3), Bay-Dune(7), Dune-Port(7), Cape-Pine(8), Bay-Mill(9), Cliff-Pine(9), Cape-Rock(17), Dune-Rock(20), Port-Rock(22). Target: beat 84.

NEXT_SUB: {"id": 1, "desc": "Enumerate promising Steiner tree candidates connecting Port, Pine, Rock; compute cable cost + 15*chromatic_number for each; identify best feasible solution", "p_solve": 0.85, "time_budget_s": 300}

SUB_2: Searching for cheaper trees with cable cost < 49 while maintaining 2 colors.

Try: Dune-Port(7) + Bay-Dune(7) + Bay-Rock(22) + Cape-Pine(8) = 44 cable. Tree on {Port,Dune,Bay,Rock,Cape,Pine}, 5 edges, 6 nodes. Connected: Port-Dune-Bay-Rock, Bay connected, Cape-Pine connected but Cape not connected to rest! Need Cape-Rock(17) or similar. Add Cape-Rock: 44+17=61, worse.

Try: Bay-Port(2) + Bay-Rock(22) + Cape-Pine(8) + Cape-Rock(17) = 49. Already found (Candidate 2).

Try: Bay-Port(2) + Dune-Port(7) + Dune-Rock(20) + Cape-Pine(8) + Cape-Rock(17). That's 5 edges, 6 nodes {Port,Bay,Dune,Rock,Cape,Pine}. But Cape-Rock and Dune-Rock both connect to Rock - check for cycle: Port-Bay, Port-Dune, Dune-Rock, Cape-Rock, Cape-Pine. Is there a cycle? Rock connects to Dune and Cape; Cape connects to Pine and Rock; no cycle. Tree! Cable=2+7+20+8+17=54. Conflicts: Bay-Port(active)→Bay≠Port; Bay-Dune(active)→Bay≠Dune; Dune-Port(active)→Dune≠Port; Cape-Pine(active)→Cape≠Pine. Need: Bay≠Port, Bay≠Dune, Dune≠Port, Cape≠Pine. Port=1,Dune=2,Bay=3,Rock=1,Cape=1,Pine=2. 3 colors. Cost=54+45=99. Worse.

Try: Mill-Port(9) + Dune-Mill(3) + Dune-Rock(20) + Cape-Pine(8) + Cape-Rock(17). 5 edges, 6 nodes {Port,Mill,Dune,Rock,Cape,Pine}. Cable=9+3+20+8+17=57. Conflicts among active: Bay inactive, Cliff inactive. Dune-Port(active)→Dune≠Port. Cape-Pine(active)→Cape≠Pine. Port=1,Mill=1,Dune=2,Rock=1,Cape=1,Pine=2. 2 colors. Total=57+30=87. Worse than 79.

Try: Bay-Port(2) + Bay-Mill(9) + Dune-Mill(3) + Dune-Rock(20) + Cape-Pine(8). 5 edges, 6 nodes {Port,Bay,Mill,Dune,Rock,Cape,Pine}... wait 7 nodes need 6 edges. Cape not connected to rest. Add Cape-Rock(17): cable=2+9+3+20+8+17=59. Conflicts: Bay-Port→Bay≠Port; Bay-Dune→Bay≠Dune; Dune-Port(both active)→Dune≠Port; Cape-Pine→Cape≠Pine. Need 3 colors again. 59+45=104. Worse.

Candidate 2 at 79 remains best. Can we get cable < 49 with 2 colors? Minimum spanning tree on {Port,Pine,Rock} directly: Port-Rock(22)+Cape-Pine(8)+Cape-Rock(17)=47, 4 nodes. Conflicts: Cape-Pine→Cape≠Pine. Only 1 constraint, 2 colors. Total=47+30=77! Check tree: Port-Rock, Cape-Rock, Cape-Pine. 3 edges, 4 nodes {Port,Rock,Cape,Pine}. Connected, no cycle. Valid!

Assign: Port=1, Rock=1, Cape=1, Pine=2 (Cape≠Pine). 2 colors. Total=47+30=77. Better!

Can we do even better? Try Port-Rock(22)+Cape-Pine(8)+Cliff-Rock(25)... no, 55 cable. Try Port-Rock(22)+Cape-Pine(8)+Cape-Rock(17)=47 is already good.

What about 1 color? Need no active interference pairs. Port-Rock(22)+Dune-Pine(25)=47 but not connected (Port,Rock separate from Dune,Pine). Need bridge: add Dune-Rock(20)→47+20=67, 1 color possible if no conflicts. Active: Port,Rock,Dune,Pine. Dune-Port active→Dune≠Port. Can't do 1 color. 67+30=97. Worse.

Best found: Port-Rock(22)+Cape-Rock(17)+Cape-Pine(8)=47 cable, 2 colors, total=77.

BEST_GUESS: {"edges": [["Port", "Rock"], ["Cape", "Rock"], ["Cape", "Pine"]], "frequencies": {"Port": 1, "Rock": 1, "Cape": 1, "Pine": 2}}

UPDATED_PLAN_STATE: Best solution: tree Port-Rock, Cape-Rock, Cape-Pine with cable cost 47 and 2 colors = total 77. Beats previous best of 79. Check if anything cheaper exists: need cable < 47 with ≤2 colors connecting Port, Pine, Rock. Minimum possible with 3 nodes directly would need Port-Pine edge (doesn't exist) or Port-Rock(22)+something to Pine cheaply. Cape-Pine(8) is cheapest to Pine. Cape-Rock(17) connects Cape to Rock. Alternative: Port-Rock(22)+Cliff-Pine(9)+Cliff-Rock(25)=56, worse. Or Bay-Port(2)+Bay-Rock(22)+Cape-Pine(8)+Cape-Rock(17)=49 with 2 colors=79. Current best 77 seems hard to beat.

DECISION: stop
